name: debug-confirm-fix
default_program: [stages: preflight>detect>verify>review>audit | scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) | policy: evidence,quality-gates{tests},deterministic-output | lens: contract-evidence-verifier | output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REPRO_STEPS
required_inputs.description: Repro steps used to confirm the fix.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Tests, logs, or prior debug evidence already known.
